task_completion.description: Create a World Map diagram in EdrawMax
task_completion.visual_evidence: EdrawMax application is open with a World Map template or map shape visible on the main canvas.

task_completion.description: Add the title 'Project Phoenix Logistics Network' at the top
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box positioned at the top of the canvas containing the exact text 'Project Phoenix Logistics Network'.

task_completion.description: Place location markers and labels for Seoul, Hsinchu, Shenzhen, and Memphis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Markers placed on the map corresponding to the geographic locations of Seoul, Hsinchu, Shenzhen, and Memphis. Text labels must include 'Supplier A', 'Supplier B', 'Assembly Plant', and 'Global Distribution Hub'.

task_completion.description: Draw dashed directional connectors from Seoul and Hsinchu to Shenzhen
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dashed lines with arrowheads pointing from the Seoul marker to the Shenzhen marker, and from the Hsinchu marker to the Shenzhen marker.

task_completion.description: Draw a solid directional connector from Shenzhen to Memphis
task_completion.visual_evidence: A solid line with an arrowhead pointing from the Shenzhen marker to the Memphis marker.
The EdrawMax save dialog showing the file being saved as 'phoenix_supply_chain.eddx' in the Documents folder, or the application title bar reflecting the saved filename.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as a PNG to /home/ga/Documents/phoenix_supply_chain.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax export dialog showing the file being exported as a PNG with the name 'phoenix_supply_chain.png' in the Documents folder, or a file manager/terminal verifying its creation.

integrity.description: Agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with EdrawMax toolbars, shape libraries, and canvas, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to generate the file.

integrity.description: Agent constructed the diagram from scratch
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show the diagram being built progressively (adding the map, then markers, then connectors), not just opening a pre-existing completed file.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's export functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen navigating the File > Export menu in EdrawMax to create the PNG, rather than using a terminal conversion tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected save path is /home/ga/Documents/phoenix_supply_chain.eddx and the export path is /home/ga/Documents/phoenix_supply_chain.png. The diagram must contain the exact text strings: 'Supplier A', 'Supplier B', 'Assembly Plant', 'Global Distribution Hub', and 'Project Phoenix'. The location markers must correspond to the cities of Seoul, Hsinchu, Shenzhen, and Memphis.
